name: Stayman
description: 2♣ response to 1NT asking for a 4-card major. Opener rebids 2♦ (no major), 2♥ (4+ hearts), or 2♠ (4+ spades, denies 4 hearts).

name: Jacoby Transfers
description: 2♦/2♥ responses to 1NT transferring to hearts/spades. Allows opener to declare major-suit contracts and shows 5+ cards.

name: Blackwood
description: 4NT asks partner for aces. Responses: 5♣=0 or 4, 5♦=1, 5♥=2, 5♠=3. Follow-up 5NT asks for kings.

name: Gerber
description: 4♣ jump asks for aces after partner's NT bid. Responses: 4♦=0 or 4, 4♥=1, 4♠=2, 4NT=3. Follow-up 5♣ asks for kings.

name: Negative Doubles
description: Double of opponent's suit overcall showing the unbid major(s) and competitive values (~6+ HCP). Opener treats it as takeout.
